title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Reciprocity Act, 1943. (2) it extends to the whole of India 1***. 2[(3) It shall come into force on the 1st day of September, 1943.]
footnote: 1. The words "except Part B States" omitted by s. 3 and the Sch., ibid. 2. Subs. by Act 22 of 1943, s. 2, for the original sub-section (3).
